name: WordGame
short: Multiplayer PvP word guessing game played in Discord threads.
description: Start a Wordle-style multiplayer game in any channel. Players compete for points by guessing letters and words. Tracks scores globally — first to claim a correct letter position wins those points.
install_msg: Use `/wordgame start` to begin a game in any channel.
author: psykzz
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs and guess history for active word game sessions.
